items.name: Racing Helmet (Red/Green)
items.description: Introducing the Lamborghini Racing Helmet for Roblox, a sleek and high-performance headgear designed for the ultimate racing experience in the virtual world. This meticulously crafted helmet features Italian colors and the iconic Lamborghini emblem, offering a perfect blend of style and speed. Immerse yourself in the thrill of virtual racing with this exclusive accessory, available now in the Lamborghini Lab.
